## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy, review topic clusters, and discuss content audit plans for Exec's SEO efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/UpaGtstZ3yB3ptaXN4LN2Qsoy8skKYnE?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shifting focus from AI role-play content to top/middle funnel pain point-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/UpaGtstZ3yB3ptaXN4LN2Qsoy8skKYnE?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [Restructuring topic clusters to better align with Exec's ICPs and business strategy](https://fathom.video/share/UpaGtstZ3yB3ptaXN4LN2Qsoy8skKYnE?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Implementing a new Looker Dashboard for improved content performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/UpaGtstZ3yB3ptaXN4LN2Qsoy8skKYnE?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [Conducting a comprehensive content audit to optimize existing content and address technical SEO issues](https://fathom.video/share/UpaGtstZ3yB3ptaXN4LN2Qsoy8skKYnE?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Shift

  - [Moving from role-play focused content to top/middle funnel content addressing user pain points](https://fathom.video/share/UpaGtstZ3yB3ptaXN4LN2Qsoy8skKYnE?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [Competitive advantage: Diverse scenarios, but need to catch up on pain point-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/UpaGtstZ3yB3ptaXN4LN2Qsoy8skKYnE?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Competitors like Hyperbound and Second Nature already targeting top/middle funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/UpaGtstZ3yB3ptaXN4LN2Qsoy8skKYnE?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [New strategy aims to cover the current gap in Exec's content](https://fathom.video/share/UpaGtstZ3yB3ptaXN4LN2Qsoy8skKYnE?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)

### Topic Cluster Restructuring

  - [Initial proposal of four clusters received feedback for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/UpaGtstZ3yB3ptaXN4LN2Qsoy8skKYnE?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
  - [Sean suggested splitting the first cluster (customer-facing pain points) into two:](https://fathom.video/share/UpaGtstZ3yB3ptaXN4LN2Qsoy8skKYnE?tab=summary&timestamp=839.0)
    1.  IC-focused content (e.g., handling objections)
    2.  Organizational leadership content (e.g., team management)
  - [Merging the last two clusters (manager and executive effectiveness) into one](https://fathom.video/share/UpaGtstZ3yB3ptaXN4LN2Qsoy8skKYnE?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Garett emphasized focusing on the sales enablement and training persona](https://fathom.video/share/UpaGtstZ3yB3ptaXN4LN2Qsoy8skKYnE?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
  - [Agreement to create more granular content within chosen sales methodologies (e.g., MEDIC vs. SPIN)](https://fathom.video/share/UpaGtstZ3yB3ptaXN4LN2Qsoy8skKYnE?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)

### Looker Dashboard Updates

  - [New dashboard includes more structured and flexible reports](https://fathom.video/share/UpaGtstZ3yB3ptaXN4LN2Qsoy8skKYnE?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
  - [Data sources: Google Search Console and Google Analytics 4](https://fathom.video/share/UpaGtstZ3yB3ptaXN4LN2Qsoy8skKYnE?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [Key metrics: Sessions, engaged sessions, query distribution, non-branded traffic, events by landing page](https://fathom.video/share/UpaGtstZ3yB3ptaXN4LN2Qsoy8skKYnE?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
  - [LLM visibility report added to track traffic from AI platforms](https://fathom.video/share/UpaGtstZ3yB3ptaXN4LN2Qsoy8skKYnE?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)

### Content Audit Plans

  - [Goals: Improve content quality, optimize existing content, address cannibalization issues](https://fathom.video/share/UpaGtstZ3yB3ptaXN4LN2Qsoy8skKYnE?tab=summary&timestamp=1555.0)
  - [Three main actions for URLs: Keep as-is, redirect/merge, or refresh](https://fathom.video/share/UpaGtstZ3yB3ptaXN4LN2Qsoy8skKYnE?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [Garett introduced Rival Flow tool for content optimization; team to coordinate efforts](https://fathom.video/share/UpaGtstZ3yB3ptaXN4LN2Qsoy8skKYnE?tab=summary&timestamp=1656.0)
  - [Timeline: Focused audit work over the next two weeks, with limited new content production](https://fathom.video/share/UpaGtstZ3yB3ptaXN4LN2Qsoy8skKYnE?tab=summary&timestamp=1926.0)

### Technical SEO Considerations

  - [Team to implement infrastructure for merge redirects when needed](https://fathom.video/share/UpaGtstZ3yB3ptaXN4LN2Qsoy8skKYnE?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
  - [Addressing \~30 404 errors, mainly in the /explore section](https://fathom.video/share/UpaGtstZ3yB3ptaXN4LN2Qsoy8skKYnE?tab=summary&timestamp=2009.0)
  - [Sean to provide database export with URL and last updated date for content audit](https://fathom.video/share/UpaGtstZ3yB3ptaXN4LN2Qsoy8skKYnE?tab=summary&timestamp=2143.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jo to update topic clusters based on feedback and recategorize existing content](https://fathom.video/share/UpaGtstZ3yB3ptaXN4LN2Qsoy8skKYnE?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
  - [Team to coordinate on content refresh efforts, avoiding duplication of work](https://fathom.video/share/UpaGtstZ3yB3ptaXN4LN2Qsoy8skKYnE?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)
  - [Sean to send database export with URL and last updated date information](https://fathom.video/share/UpaGtstZ3yB3ptaXN4LN2Qsoy8skKYnE?tab=summary&timestamp=2143.0)
  - [Schedule a talk with Nick (Exec co-founder) to discuss content strategy insights](https://fathom.video/share/UpaGtstZ3yB3ptaXN4LN2Qsoy8skKYnE?tab=summary&timestamp=2197.0)
  - [Jo to provide a list of URLs for potential redirects/merges for team review](https://fathom.video/share/UpaGtstZ3yB3ptaXN4LN2Qsoy8skKYnE?tab=summary&timestamp=2057.0)
  - [Continue with content audit, excluding content published in the last 2-3 months](https://fathom.video/share/UpaGtstZ3yB3ptaXN4LN2Qsoy8skKYnE?tab=summary&timestamp=2159.0)
